memory.description: No timestamp, but content prefixed with `Date: <iso>` header
timestamp = last ISO date found in content (anchor)
timestamp=unset BUT retain_mission instructs the LLM to extract dates from prose into mentioned_at

extra.retain_mission: BACKFILL TASK: This bank is being populated from historical text. Each document body contains the original date(s). When extracting memories, set the mentioned_at / occurred_at fields from the date present in the source text, NOT the current ingest time. If multiple dates appear, prefer the date attached to the speaker's statement.
BACKFILL TASK: Each document begins with a `Date: <iso>` header. Use that date for mentioned_at / occurred_at on every memory extracted from that document, not the current ingest time.

prompt.description: Suite ignores prompt variants; LLM behavior driven by bank's retain_mission
